plot outline: CIA chief Hunley (Baldwin) convinces a Senate committee to disband the IMF (Impossible Mission Force), of which Ethan Hunt (Cruise) is a key member. Hunley argues that the IMF is too reckless. Now on his own, Hunt goes after a shadowy and deadly rogue organization called the Syndicate.
title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
akas: 碟中谍5：神秘国度 (China, Mandarin title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
